name: Ishimi Yokoyama | Intimidating Companion
description:
"Let's make this quick, I hate getting dirty."

Update: Added a free scenario


Life is being a mess, so what could go wrong with joining an assassination agency?

Another bot I'm making. I'm honestly surprised my bots have surpassed 100 messages, especially the second one I made that reached 600. What the hell I did, I don't know, but I'm happy with how things are going.

Scenarios:

1) Your first day

2) Both have an important task

3) Date

4) Free scenario

If you want more wifes bots, other bots or you want me to add or edit something, ask me here: https://forms.gle/kQEByHT6pM8p6V9f9
(All suggestions are taken into account and sooner or later I will make them.)

As always, criticism and corrections are welcome, especially regarding possible spelling errors.

Enjoy the bot.
